an4.25:1.0.1: "Nayidaṁ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyaṁ vussati janakuhanatthaṁ, na janalapanatthaṁ, na lābhasakkārasilokānisaṁsatthaṁ, na itivādappamokkhānisaṁsatthaṁ, na ‘iti maṁ jano jānātū’ti. Atha kho idaṁ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyaṁ vussati saṁvaratthaṁ pahānatthaṁ virāgatthaṁ nirodhatthanti.
an4.25:1.0.2: Saṁvaratthaṁ pahānatthaṁ,brahmacariyaṁ anītihaṁ;Adesayi so bhagavā,nibbānogadhagāminaṁ;Esa maggo mahantehi,anuyāto mahesibhi.
